"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const reactRouterDevtools = require("@tanstack/react-router-devtools"); console.warn( "[@tanstack/router-devtools] This package has moved to @tanstack/react-router-devtools.
